title: Oyster Crumble Bliss
description: A kid-friendly, fermented oyster crumble dish with a touch of garam masala to make it jain-friendly and perfect for breakfast.
instructions: Blanch oysters in boiling water for 5-7 minutes.
Remove from heat and place the blanched oysters on a clean paper towel to drain any excess moisture, then lightly toast them in a dry pan until crispy.
In a blender or food processor, blend together the ginger, onion, garlic, cumin seeds, coriander powder, and flaxseed meal. Add water if needed to reach desired consistency.
Mix the oyster crumble with the blended ingredients, adding salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a breakfast dish.
